name: the generic runner degrades an optional absent non-bespoke tool to not_enforced, never a vacuous green
command: printf 'x\n' > f.txt && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool ruff --file f.txt --json >/dev/null 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'status=not_enforced' e.txt && echo generic-optional-absent-not-enforced 1>&2
